name: I&I Group Public Company Limited
summary: I&I Group Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a digital and technology consulting company in Thailand. It operates through three segments: Customer Relationship Program, Enterprise Resource Planning Program, and Digital Marketing Services. The company provides consultation on computer systems; sells subscription; and provides support on computer software licenses. It also offers services in the areas of business analytics and marketing strategy, digital marketing, data management and technology, customer relationship and experience management, and placement service. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Ratchathewi, Thailand.
